theme.description: Premium Urban Utility. The aesthetic is concrete, fast-action, and authoritative, merging high-end editorial layouts with hyper-functional service app design. Inspired by Swiss grids, featuring stark white and intense black, contrasted with a distinct 'Beezy Honey Gold' to signal trust, speed, and premium quality.

rules: Headings strictly use Cabinet Grotesk, varying from Bold to Black.
Overlines must be IBM Plex Sans, uppercase, wide tracking.
Never center text by default; use stark left alignment unless optical balance dictates otherwise.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 to p-8).
Avoid traditional 'cards' with drop shadows. Use 1px hard borders (border-black/10) with sharp corners.
Use massive negative space to isolate high-value components (e.g., booking form).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-foreground text-foreground font-bold uppercase tracking-wide px-8 py-4 hover:bg-foreground hover:text-background transition-colors

components.inputs: border-b-2 border-border bg-transparent px-0 py-3 text-lg focus:border-foreground focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors
components.cards: bg-surface border border-border p-8 hover:border-foreground transition-colors duration-300
components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border border-foreground bg-white

hero_background.description: Abstract architectural background with honey gold and matte black geometric shapes.

services_abstract.description: Flat lay of premium matte black tools on honey yellow background.

plumber_service.description: Close up of a plumber fixing pipes.

sections.name: Navigation / Header
sections.design: Glassmorphism header (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border). Left-aligned logo, right-aligned nav links and 'Book Now' primary CTA.

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.design: Massive left-aligned H1 text 'Your Trusted Partner for Home Solutions, Delivered with Speed & Care.' over a split layout. Right side contains the booking flow widget. Use 'hero_background' faintly layered behind the left text block with a blend mode.

sections.name: Service Booking Widget (Embedded in Hero / Sticky)
sections.design: High-contrast 'Control Room' style bento box. Step 1: Service Select (Plumbing, Electrical, etc.). Step 2: Date/Time picker. Step 3: Address. Use heavily customized Shadcn Select and Calendar components. Sharp edges, active state marked with 'Beezy Gold'.

sections.name: Services Showcase (Bento Grid)
sections.design: Asymmetrical 12-column bento grid. Plumber and Electrician take col-span-8 or col-span-6. Use actual imagery (plumber_service, cleaner_service) with heavy B&W filters that turn color on hover. Badges on top left: 'LIVE', 'MONTH 3', 'MONTH 6'.

sections.name: Beezy Shield Subscription
sections.design: Dark mode section (bg-black text-white) to create tension and highlight premium tier. Accent with Beezy Gold. Display ₹2,999/yr pricing aggressively large. List benefits (4 plumbing visits, 2 electrical, 1 deep clean, same-day guarantee).

sections.name: Why Beezy / Trust Section
sections.design: 4-column grid with stark, oversized typography. '60 MIN RESPONSE', 'VERIFIED PROS', 'SINGLE PLATFORM', 'TRANSPARENT PRICING'. Use IBM Plex Sans Mono or IBM Plex Sans for numbers to give a technical, reliable feel.

sections.name: Join the Pilot (Waitlist)
sections.design: Housed within a soft gray (bg-muted) container with a harsh black border. Input fields for Name, Phone, Apartment Complex. Sub-text highlighting '30-day free pilot in Koramangala'.

sections.name: Investor Pitch (Dedicated Section)
sections.design: Editorial layout. Use 'bangalore_city' image as a cinematic, grainy background with 60% black overlay. Stats: ₹1.5L Cr Market, ₹15 Lakhs Ask. Embed Pitch deck in a sleek, hard-edged iframe container. 'Phase 1 / 2 / 3' roadmap shown via a 'Tracing Beam' vertical line.

sections.name: Footer
sections.design: Massive typography for 'BEEZY'. Solid black background. Yellow links. Email: beezyassistance@gmail.com clearly visible at text-2xl.

interactions.hover: High contrast shifts. Buttons invert (Gold -> Black). Images switch from grayscale to full color.
interactions.scroll: Use Framer Motion to slide in elements slightly from the bottom. Stagger bento box children.
interactions.active_states: Forms inputs gain a thick 2px black bottom border. Select elements have a solid yellow left border when active.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use generic Inter font. Import and use Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body) via Google Fonts, Fontsource, or equivalent.
All containers must use sharp corners (rounded-none). The brand is functional and fast, not soft and bubbly.
Rely heavily on the grid. If using Shadcn components, override their default soft shadows and radii to match the 'Swiss Brutalist' theme.
Ensure all data-testids are correctly applied as specified in the sections.
Implement the 'Beezy Gold' (#FFB800) primarily as an accent, active state, or CTA color to maintain high contrast against the black and white base.
Ensure all code generated is in .js and .jsx format, not .tsx.
